name: GroveX Tech & Solutions LLC
description: GroveX Tech & Solutions LLC is a community-rooted B2B growth studio serving Turtle Creek and the Mon Valley. We build practical websites, dependable IT systems, and custom software that help small businesses improve lead flow, strengthen operations, and grow with confidence.
tagline: Websites, systems, and growth foundations for small businesses
mission: To help local businesses grow with practical websites, stronger systems, and dependable support that improve operations now and create a better foundation for future marketing and customer acquisition.
values: Business-first thinking: Build what improves outcomes, not just appearances
Technical excellence: Use proven tools and sound implementation
Clear communication: No jargon, just practical advice
Reliable support: Stay useful after the site launches
Local commitment: Help strong local businesses compete better
Sustainable growth: Fix the foundation before scaling spend
